title: phlomoides molucelloides
intro: Phlomoides molucelloides, also known as Phlomis mollucelloides, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is a shrub that is native to the subtropical regions of Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Phlomoides molucelloides include soothing digestive issues and reducing fever, and it is often used in herbal preparations such as teas and tinctures to treat various health conditions.
